mapper.sql: select oid, batch_no, template_oid, quantity, spec, price, total_amount, subbranch_org_id, branch_org_id, head_org_id, created_by, detail_view, detail_status, status_remark, del_flag, version from vms_batch_detail
mapper.insert:
insert into vms_batch_detail batch_no, template_oid, quantity, spec, price, total_amount, subbranch_org_id, branch_org_id, head_org_id, created_by, detail_view, detail_status, status_remark, del_flag, version,
#{batchNo}, #{templateOid}, #{quantity}, #{spec}, #{price}, #{totalAmount}, #{subbranchOrgId}, #{branchOrgId}, #{headOrgId}, #{createdBy}, #{detailView}, #{detailStatus}, #{statusRemark}, #{delFlag}, #{version},
mapper.update: update vms_batch_detail batch_no = #{batchNo}, template_oid = #{templateOid}, quantity = #{quantity}, spec = #{spec}, price = #{price}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, subbranch_org_id = #{subbranchOrgId}, branch_org_id = #{branchOrgId}, head_org_id = #{headOrgId}, created_by = #{createdBy}, detail_view = #{detailView}, detail_status = #{detailStatus}, status_remark = #{statusRemark}, del_flag = #{delFlag}, where oid = #{oid}

update vms_batch_detail batch_no = #{batchNo}, template_oid = #{templateOid}, quantity = #{quantity}, spec = #{spec}, price = #{price}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, subbranch_org_id = #{subbranchOrgId}, branch_org_id = #{branchOrgId}, head_org_id = #{headOrgId}, created_by = #{createdBy}, detail_view = #{detailView}, detail_status = #{detailStatus}, status_remark = #{statusRemark}, del_flag = #{delFlag}, version = version + 1, update_time = sysdate() where oid = #{oid} and version = #{version}
mapper.delete: delete from vms_batch_detail where oid = #{oid} and version = #{version}
delete from vms_batch_detail where oid in #{oid}
mapper.select:
select d.template_oid as templateOid, t.category, t.template_name as templateName, t.template_code as templateCode, v.vendor_name as vendorName, t.spec, t.price, SUM(d.quantity) as totalQuantity, SUM(d.total_amount) as totalAmount, d.branch_org_id as branchOrgId from vms_batch_detail d left join vms_voucher_template t on d.template_oid = t.oid left join vms_vendor v on t.vendor_oid = v.oid
and d.batch_no = #{batchNo} and d.branch_org_id = #{branchOrgId} and d.detail_status = '00'
group by d.template_oid, t.category, t.template_name, t.template_code, v.vendor_name, t.spec, t.price, d.branch_org_id

select d.template_oid as templateOid, t.template_name as voucherName, t.vendor_oid as vendorOid, v.vendor_name as vendorName, t.spec, t.price, SUM(d.quantity) as quantity, SUM(d.total_amount) as amount, d.branch_org_id as branchOrgId from vms_batch_detail d left join vms_voucher_template t on d.template_oid = t.oid left join vms_vendor v on t.vendor_oid = v.oid left join vms_batch_org_status os on d.branch_org_id = os.org_id and os.batch_no = d.batch_no where d.batch_no = #{batchNo} and d.detail_status = '00' and os.detail_status = '22' group by d.template_oid, t.template_name, t.vendor_oid, v.vendor_name, t.spec, t.price, d.branch_org_id
